description_long: This surveillance camera features a cylindrical, bullet-style housing with a prominent sunshield extending over the lens. The body is constructed from a smooth, light-colored material, likely metal or high-grade plastic, and is mounted on a robust, articulated arm with a rectangular base for secure attachment to vertical surfaces. The front of the camera reveals a circular lens surrounded by a mesh or grille, possibly for protection or ventilation, and the lens area is recessed for added weather resistance. The mounting arm includes visible adjustment hardware, allowing for precise directional aiming. The rear of the camera displays a flat panel with technical labels and information, indicating the presence of internal electronics. The overall design is utilitarian and weatherproof, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A bullet-style surveillance camera with a cylindrical body, sunshield, and adjustable mounting arm, featuring a recessed lens and robust construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body, sunshield, and articulated mounting arm with adjustment hardware.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the recessed lens surrounded by a mesh or grille, with the sunshield extending overhead.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the body, sunshield, and mounting arm from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat back panel with technical labels and the mounting arm extending downward.
